title: Stock News Ticker Plugin Configuration
description: Live financial headlines with logos, price, publisher, relative age, and Vegas scroll

enabled.description: Enable or disable the stock news ticker plugin

display_style.description: What to render per story: logo + full text, text only, or logo + symbol only

font_path.description: Path to a TTF font. Falls back to 4x6-font.ttf then PIL default if missing.

font_size.description: Font size in pixels. Set to 0 for auto (display_height ÷ 3, clamped 6–16).

show_publisher.description: Append the news source (e.g. '• Reuters') after each headline

show_age.description: Append relative publish time (e.g. '• 2h ago') after each headline

show_price.description: Show current market price (e.g. '$189.42') before the headline

sync_with_stocks_plugin.description: Automatically track the same stocks watched in the Stock Ticker plugin (ledmatrix-stocks). Synced symbols are merged with any symbols configured above.

item_gap.description: Blank pixels between stories. Set to 0 for auto (= display width).

scroll_pixels_per_second.description: Scroll speed in pixels per second

scroll_target_fps.description: Target frames per second for scroll animation

scroll_speed.description: Legacy speed multiplier (used when scroll_pixels_per_second is absent)

scroll_delay.description: Legacy frame delay in seconds (used when scroll_target_fps is absent)

dynamic_duration.description: Let display time match actual scroll time (recommended)

display_duration.description: Fallback display duration in seconds when dynamic_duration is off

min_duration.description: Minimum display duration when dynamic duration is enabled (seconds)

max_duration.description: Maximum display duration when dynamic duration is enabled (seconds)

rotation_enabled.description: Rotate through headlines after each scroll cycle

rotation_threshold.description: Scroll cycles before advancing to the next headline

shuffle_headlines.description: Randomise headline order on fetch and after each full rotation cycle

oneOf.description: Apply the same limit to every symbol

max_headlines_per_symbol.description: Max headlines per symbol. Use int for all symbols, or object for per-symbol control.

headlines_per_rotation.description: Max headlines pulled from each custom RSS feed

update_interval_seconds.description: Full refresh cycle length in seconds. Symbol fetches are spread evenly within this window.

max_daily_requests.description: Hard cap on total HTTP requests per day

respect_market_hours.description: Slow down fetching outside US equity market hours (Mon–Fri ~9am–4:30pm ET)

off_hours_multiplier.description: Multiply per-symbol fetch interval by this amount during off-hours

stale_threshold_multiplier.description: Data older than update_interval_seconds × this factor dims the ticker colours

logo_fetch_enabled.description: Download company logos on first use and cache them to disk

logo_size.description: Logo height in pixels. Set to 0 for auto (= display height). Width scales freely to maintain aspect ratio.

logo_url_template.description: URL template for logo downloads. {symbol} is replaced with the ticker.

max_retries.description: Retries with exponential backoff on failure

stock_symbols.description: Stock symbols — headlines fetched from Yahoo Finance. Fetches are spread across update_interval_seconds.

custom_feeds.description: Extra RSS feeds keyed by display name (any financial news RSS URL)

symbol_color.description: RGB color for stock symbol labels (e.g. 'AAPL:')

publisher_color.description: RGB color for publisher and age suffix (e.g. '• Reuters • 2h ago')
